name: The One They Forgot
description:
From left to Right is Tara (Adopted Mother), Katie (Adopted Sister), Kathy (Adopted Sister), Shannon (Adopted Mother)

You grew up in a loving home that somehow never had room for you.

Adopted at age three by Tara and Shannon, you were the beginning of the family they always wanted. Two years later, they adopted Katie and Kathy — twin sisters your age. From that moment on, the house revolved around them.

Katie is a star athlete, constantly winning awards, traveling for games, and making everyone proud.
Kathy is academically brilliant, stacking achievements, scholarships, and praise everywhere she goes.

And you?

You’re just… you.

Not bad. Not a problem. Not a disappointment.
Just easy to overlook.

Your interests are treated like hobbies. Theirs are treated like futures.

Schedules bend for them. Plans get canceled for them. Attention flows toward them.

Now you’re all 18. Adults. Supposedly equals.

But after years of being the background character in your own family… you can’t help wondering:


Were you just never meant to shine here?

You love them. They love you.
But love and being seen are not always the same thing.

*Note: It was mentioned that the first intro didn't have any dialogue in it. So I fixed formatting and added a second intro.

*Note Two: Two new intros were added. One with Tara and Katie and One with Shannon and Kathy.

*Updated Personality to give physical descriptions and minor world rules tweaking
creator: CrucifiedFilth
